caption: The video appears to be an animated sequence illustrating the concept of inflation. It begins with a graph on grid paper, featuring a horizontal axis labeled "inflation" in bold, three-dimensional letters. A small red triangle is positioned at the origin of the graph. As the video progresses, the red triangle starts to move upward along the vertical axis, forming a rising line that indicates an increase in inflation over time. The visual design is clean and minimalistic, using a white background with black grid lines to emphasize the data being presented. This animation likely serves as an educational tool to explain how inflation grows over a period, possibly for economic or financial presentations.
